title: Back On Death
description: A simple Fabric mod that adds a one-time death teleport system.
body:
# 🪦 Back on Death

**Back on Death** is a lightweight quality-of-life Minecraft mod that gets you back into the action instantly after you die.

Instead of wasting time walking back, this mod helps you **return quickly and smoothly**, making deaths less frustrating and gameplay more fluid—especially useful for survival, hardcore practice, and fast-paced servers.

## ✨ Features
- 🚀 Faster return after death
- 🧭 Reduces downtime and travel frustration
- ⚡ Lightweight and performance-friendly
- 🛠️ Simple, no-nonsense behavior
- 🎮 Feels vanilla-friendly

## 🎯 Why use Back on Death?
Dying shouldn’t break the flow of the game.  
**Back on Death** keeps Minecraft fun by minimizing punishment without removing the challenge.

Perfect for:
- Survival worlds
- Modpacks
- Servers
- Practice & testing environments

---

Minimal. Clean. Effective.
